{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184004083DA0F3049463CBF276"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7603437570271904537","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还行，看了90章，怎么说呢，要是一般穿越者，早就摄政王了，那用这么麻烦，这么老了，还要工作","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":24,"text":"摄政王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%91%84%E6%94%BF%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426240463CBF276%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227603437570271904537%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227588107470317292606%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%91%84%E6%94%BF%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770319938,"group_id":"7588107470317292606","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N88oK0ln07qwW/le5DiRcp6F2GFZ5HrcECVKXeM6TkBW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3414448042155556","user_name":"一丝无奈的草摩楝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3414448042155556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588107470317292606","book_info":{"abstract":"好消息：我叫何清，是个穿越者，来到大宋百年后位极人臣，成为三朝宰相，百岁太师！
　　坏消息：我刚到江南休息了几年，东京便被攻破了，徽、钦二宗被金人掳走，发生了靖康之耻！
　　更坏的消息：我绑定了昏君再造系统，寿元与大宋挂钩，如今，系统把我的目标绑定为了赵构，那位历史上的“完颜九妹”！
　　岳飞都攻到朱仙镇了，他要议和！
　　京城眼看要光复了，他要议和！
　　金人都要大宋称臣了，他还要议和！
　　玛德，我坐不住了！
　　重回朝堂第一件事，我便要求赵构御驾亲征，想教他做一个合格的皇帝！
　　可谁知道，他趁着在太庙祭祖时，竟大骂我是史上第一大权臣！
　　同时，他的心声也跨越时空，传递给了开国太祖赵匡胤！
　　听到权臣再现，赵匡胤气的摔碎了酒杯，“视皇帝为棋子？奸臣！妥妥的奸臣！”
　　可当听到我的诸多策略跟操作后！
　　赵匡胤沉默了:“这是奸臣啊？这特么是史上第一大忠臣吧！”
　　赵光义：“学，这些策略给我立即学！”
　　满朝文武：“有何清在，我大宋定当战无不胜！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/210a1cb2011cb27a619c1ae90944fea3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"暴躁柴犬想吃肉","author_id":"","book_id":"7588107470317292606","book_name":"三朝太师，大宋没我真得散！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1463人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588116536817093657","read_count":"1463","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"488559"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"238","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,宋朝,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/210a1cb2011cb27a619c1ae90944fea3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446404&x-signature=QezeZJEuiM5IfiS4PPzwvNKwz18%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"90"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184004083DA0F3049463CBF276"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"list
